def test_process_batch_processes_all_items():
    items = [1, 2, 3, 4]
    expected = [2, 4, 6, 8]
    result = process_batch(items)
    assert len(result) == len(items), f"Expected {len(items)} results, but got {len(result)}"
    assert result == expected, f"Expected {expected}, but got {result}"

from source import process_batch

def test_process_batch_processes_all_items():
    items = [1, 2, 3]
    result = process_batch(items)
    expected = [2, 4, 6]
    assert len(result) == len(items), f"Expected output length {len(items)}, but got {len(result)}"
    assert result == expected, f"Expected {expected}, but got {result}"
